title: feat: add wan-fast (wan2.2) free-tier video model
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Fast, free, and moving
gist.blurb: Video generation just got a new free tier. We added wan-fast to the API—powered by Alibaba's Wan2.2—so you can turn text and images into motion without spending a dime.
gist.summary: Added the wan-fast video model to the API, bringing free-tier text-to-video and image-to-video generation powered by Alibaba's Wan2.2.
gist.impact: Users can now generate 5-second 480P videos for free using the wan-fast model, which automatically routes between text-to-video and image-to-video based on the input.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as a movie director with a clapperboard, alongside the Monitor Robot displaying a moving video. Represents the new fast, free video generation model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny director's beret and holding a clapperboard, standing next to a chunky Monitor Robot whose screen shows a fast-moving landscape video. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny director's beret and holding a clapperboard, standing next to a chunky Monitor Robot whose screen shows a fast-moving landscape video. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
